title: acalypha rupestris
intro: Acalypha rupestris, also known as the rock copperleaf or rock weed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Acalypha rupestris include the treatment of various skin conditions such as eczema, wounds, and ulcers, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat kidney and urinary issues. Acalypha rupestris can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
